channel.title: Boletim de Cyber Segurança - Técnica - Diário

item.title: Boletim de Cyber Segurança - Técnica - Diário
item.description:
🚨 Boletim de Cyber Segurança - Técnica
Visão geral:
• 0 com severidade Crítica
• 4 com severidade Alta
• 1 novas CVEs
• 2 novos advisories/exploits

────────────────────────────────────
Infraestrutura - Docker / ESX / Elastic / Grafana / Nginx / VMware / Zabbix

Sem notícias para seção de Infraestrutura.

────────────────────────────────────
Segurança - Acronis / Axur / Check Point / Harmony SASE / Qualys / SentinelOne

💣 Critical flaw in Protobuf library enables JavaScript code execution
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Proof-of-concept exploit code has been published for a critical remote code execution flaw in protobuf.js, a widely used JavaScript implementation of Google's Protocol Buffers.
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/critical-flaw-in-protobuf-library-enables-javascript-code-execution/
 
📰 [Webinar] Eliminate Ghost Identities Before They Expose Your Enterprise Data
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: The Hacker News
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
In 2024, compromised service accounts and forgotten API keys were behind 68% of cloud breaches. Unmanaged non-human identities that nobody was watching. For every employee in your org, there are 40 to 50 automated credentials: service accounts, API tokens, AI agent connections, and OAuth grants.
Link: https://thehackernews.com/2026/04/webinar-find-and-eliminate-orphaned-non.html
 
📰 Microsoft Teams right-click paste broken by Edge update bug
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A notícia está relacionada a SentinelOne no contexto de segurança da informação, com potencial relevância para monitoramento, prevenção ou resposta.
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/microsoft/microsoft-teams-right-click-paste-broken-by-edge-update-bug/
 
📰 $13.74M Hack Shuts Down Sanctioned Grinex Exchange After Intelligence Claims
 
Criticidade: Baixa
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: The Hacker News
CVSS: 3.7
Resumo:
Grinex, a Kyrgyzstan-incorporated cryptocurrency exchange sanctioned by the U.K. last year, said it's suspending operations after it blamed Western intelligence agencies for a $13.74 million hack. The exchange said it fell victim to what it described as a large-scale cyber attack that bore hallmarks of foreign intelligence agency involvement.
Link: https://thehackernews.com/2026/04/1374m-hack-shuts-down-sanctioned-grinex.html
 
────────────────────────────────────
Sistemas / Cloud - 1Password / Azure / Office / Ubuntu / Windows Server / WordPress

🚨 CVE-2026-3464 - WordPress
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: WordPress
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 8.8
Resumo:
The WP Customer Area plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to arbitrary file read and deletion due to insufficient file path validation in the 'ajax_attach_file' function in all versions up to, and including, 8.3.4. This makes it possible for authenticated attackers with a role that an administrator grants access to (e.g., Subscriber) to to read the contents of arbitrary files on the server, which can contain sensitive...
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-3464
 
💣 A dangerous WordPress plugin bug is being actively exploited - TechRadar
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: WordPress
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A publicação menciona exploração ativa, técnica ofensiva ou abuso envolvendo WordPress. Consulte o link para entender melhor o impacto e as recomendações.
Link: https://news.google.?oc=5
 
📰 Microsoft addresses 163 CVEs, 88 advisories for April Patch Tuesday - Sophos
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: Windows Server
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A notícia aborda atualização ou correção de segurança associada a Windows Server, o que pode exigir validação e aplicação no ambiente.
Link: https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMid0FVX3lxTE1KMXp5Z1dhdmVyanNGaUpObV83OTY4clR6aHl0ZmFMSGdiNEZZdFZDZkxWMjN6by0yZGk2bzB1N3g0ZTlYVUhVVlhhYXBlU2xqaHhRSjQ5U3BMRXFtaFlheEpySHJaTnQtSFMyTVQ4OHo1Y0pid3Jj?oc=5
 
────────────────────────────────────
Período: Notícias dos dias 17/04/2026 e 18/04/2026.
